About Organization

Rajasthan High Court is the highest court in the Indian state of Rajasthan. It was established on 29 August 1949.
The court has a sanctioned strength of 50 judges.

About the Programme

The Rajasthan High Court Stenographer Recruitment 2026 is a government job opportunity for Indian citizens. The recruitment is for 163 posts of stenographers.
The online application process started on 22 July 2026 and will end on 10 August 2026.
